subject: REVISED M2: Unify RAG (Delete services/rag)
description:
CRITICAL FIX: There are TWO RAG implementations - apps/api (real) and services/rag (stub). docker-compose runs both. This is confusing.

APPROACH:
1. DELETE services/rag/ entirely (it's a stub, never implemented)
2. Update docker-compose.yml to remove rag service
3. apps/api/rag/ is the ONLY RAG path
4. Document that RAG is a module, not a microservice

ACCEPTANCE:
- services/rag/ directory DELETED
- docker-compose.yml has no rag service
- Only /rag/query endpoint is in apps/api
- RAG pipeline at apps/api/src/islam_intelligent/rag/ is fully functional
